vocabulary.definition: a story meant to prove you were somewhere else when something happened
vocabulary.example: Excuses, alibis, and wild cover-up stories chased each other around Harry’s brain, each more feeble than the last.

vocabulary.definition: to trap someone so they cannot escape or avoid trouble
to get involved in something that is not your business
vocabulary.example: It was a bit late to repair the damage, but Harry swore to himself not to meddle in things that weren’t his business from now on.

vocabulary.definition: to make soft, frightened crying sounds
vocabulary.example: Walking back from the library on his own one afternoon, he heard somebody whimpering from a classroom up ahead.

vocabulary.definition: a weapon like a small bow mounted on a stock, used to shoot arrows
vocabulary.example: He was carrying his large crossbow, and a quiver of arrows hung over his shoulder.

vocabulary.definition: a magical horse-like creature with a single horn on its forehead
a magical creature with a human upper body and a horse's lower body
vocabulary.example: He walked forward and shook the centaur’s hand.

vocabulary.definition: to move smoothly along the ground like a snake
vocabulary.example: Something was slithering over dead leaves nearby: it sounded like a cloak trailing along the ground.
That is because it is a monstrous thing, to slay a unicorn,

vocabulary.definition: under an evil spell or doomed to suffer
vocabulary.example: you will have but a half life, a cursed life, from the moment the blood touches your lips.

vocabulary.definition: to shake slightly from cold or fear
vocabulary.example: He turned and cantered back into the depths of the forest, leaving Harry shivering behind him.

vocabulary.definition: a punishment that keeps students after hours for breaking rules
vocabulary.example: All three of you will receive detentions—yes, you too, Mr.

characters.name: Harry Potter
characters.description: Loses Gryffindor's lead in house points and serves detention in the Forbidden Forest.

characters.name: Hermione Granger
characters.description: Punished alongside Harry and walks the forest trail with Hagrid.

characters.name: Rubeus Hagrid
characters.description: Leads the detention party to find an injured unicorn.

characters.name: Firenze
characters.description: A centaur who saves Harry and hints that Voldemort wants the Stone.

background.hook: Caught without the Invisibility Cloak, Harry, Hermione, and Neville lose a hundred and fifty house points in one night. Their punishment sends them into the Forbidden Forest at midnight, where unicorn blood, centaurs, and a hooded figure waiting in the shadows change everything Harry thought he knew about Snape.
background.readingFocus: Notice how the school turns against Harry after the points loss. In the forest, watch what the centaurs say about Mars and what Firenze reveals about unicorn blood and the Stone.

options.text: a magical creature with one horn
a human top half and a horse's body below
a serpent's tail instead of legs
get involved in what is not your business

comprehension.stem: What is this chapter mainly about?

options.text: Harry and the others lose massive house points, serve forest detention, and Harry learns Voldemort may be hunting the Stone
The trio smuggles a dragon to the tallest tower
Harry wins the house cup at the end-of-year feast
Hagrid teaches them how to breed dragons legally

comprehension.explanation: After the Norbert disaster costs Gryffindor one hundred fifty points, detention in the Forbidden Forest leads Harry to unicorn blood, Firenze, and the truth about who wants the Stone.

comprehension.stem: How many house points does Gryffindor lose in one night?
comprehension.explanation: McGonagall takes fifty points from each of the four students, for a total of one hundred fifty.

comprehension.stem: What does McGonagall think the trio did to Malfoy?

options.text: Fed him a false story about a dragon to lure him out of bed
Stole his homework in the library
Turned him into a rat with a spell
Locked him in the astronomy tower

comprehension.explanation: She decides they told Malfoy a cock-and-bull story about a dragon to get him into trouble.

comprehension.stem: What are the students looking for in the forest?
comprehension.explanation: Hagrid says unicorn blood is on the ground and they must try to find the poor injured creature.

comprehension.stem: How does the school treat Harry after the points are lost?

options.text: He becomes the most hated student; even other houses turn on him
Everyone throws him a celebration party

comprehension.explanation: Harry goes from hero to outcast; Ravenclaws and Hufflepuffs turn on him while Slytherins cheer.

comprehension.stem: What does Firenze say unicorn blood is used for?

options.text: Keeping someone alive even when they are near death, at the cost of a cursed half-life
Curing dragon bites in the hospital wing
Helping first years pass their exams

comprehension.explanation: Firenze explains that only someone desperate would drink unicorn blood to stay alive until they can gain full power again.

comprehension.stem: What does Harry find under his sheets when he returns to the dormitory?

options.text: His Invisibility Cloak with a note that says 'Just in case.'
A dragon egg wrapped in a towel

comprehension.explanation: Someone returns the cloak Harry left on the tower with a short note pinned to it.

options.text: a story meant to prove you were not involved

vocabulary.explanation: Harry tries to think of excuses and alibis but none seem good enough.

vocabulary.stem: Hagrid carried his large ___ and a quiver of arrows.
vocabulary.explanation: Hagrid brings a crossbow when he meets the detention group.
Firenze calls killing a unicorn a monstrous crime.

vocabulary.stem: Which word is closest in meaning to 'slither'?
vocabulary.explanation: Something slithers over dead leaves like a cloak trailing on the ground.

vocabulary.stem: Harry swore not to ___ in things that weren't his business.
vocabulary.explanation: After losing the points, Harry promises to stop meddling.

cloze.title: The Forbidden Forest
paragraphs: Forgotten without the cloak, the trio are (1) ___ and lose one hundred fifty points. Harry vows not to (2) ___ anymore, but still hears Quirrell (3) ___ing in a classroom.
Their (4) ___ sends them into the forest with Hagrid's (5) ___ to search for an injured (6) ___.
Harry sees a hooded figure drink unicorn blood; Firenze the (7) ___ saves him and warns that someone wants the Stone to live again.

gaps.explanation: Harry feels they are cornered with no good excuse.
Harry swears not to meddle in things that aren't his business.
Harry hears somebody whimpering from a classroom.
Notes say their detention is at eleven o'clock tonight.
Hagrid carries his large crossbow into the forest.
Silvery blood on the path shows a unicorn has been hurt.
Firenze is a centaur who carries Harry to safety.
